# anypoint_api_instance_sla_tiers (Data Source)

Reads all SLA tiers for a given API Manager instance.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anypoint_api_instance_sla_tiers" "all" {
  org_id = var.org_id
  env_id = var.env_id
  api_id = anypoint_apim_mule4.api.id

  params {
    limit  = 200
    offset = 0
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_id` (String) The API Manager instance id.
- `env_id` (String) The environment id where the resource is defined.
- `org_id` (String) The organization id where the resource is defined.

### Optional

- `params` (Block Set) Optional pagination parameters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--params))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `tiers` (List of Object) The list of SLA tiers. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tiers))
- `total` (Number) Total number of tiers returned by the API.

<a id="nestedblock--params"></a>
### Nested Schema for `params`

Optional:

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of tiers to return.
- `offset` (Number) Offset of the first tier to return.


<a id="nestedatt--tiers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tiers`

Read-Only:

- `api_version_id` (String)
- `application_count` (Number)
- `auto_approve` (Boolean)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (Number)
- `limits` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--tiers--limits))
- `master_organization_id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `organization_id` (String)
- `status` (String)

<a id="nestedobjatt--tiers--limits"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tiers.limits`

Read-Only:

- `maximum_requests` (Number)
- `time_period_in_milliseconds` (Number)
- `visible` (Boolean)
